items.caption: A close-up of a window in a half-timbered house. the window is divided into two sections by a central mullion, and each section is further divided into smaller panes by a grid-like pattern of lead glass. the window frame is painted white, and the surrounding wall is a mix of black and white timber, with visible horizontal and vertical planks. the window is set within a black frame, and the glass appears to be clear, allowing a view of the interior of the house. the style of the image is a straightforward, real-life photograph with no apparent filters or artistic effects.
